query:
SELECT fi.name, fi.unit, fph.unitCost, fph.effectiveDate, fph.supplier
FROM feed_item_price_history fph
JOIN feed_items fi ON fph.feedItemId = fi.id
ORDER BY fi.name, fph.effectiveDate DESC;
